LAW AND MOTION 503, PETITIONER SAHDEV BIRKRAM PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS; APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF PETITIONER BIRKAM SAHDEV, D.D.S. AND MOVING PARTY, AND APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT BOARD OF DENTAL EXAMINERS, STATE OF CALIFORNIA. AT 3:00 P.M., MR. WAGER-SMITH REQUESTED STATEMENT OF DECISION. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: 1) FAILING TO REVIEW/TAKE X-RAYS OF DIAGNOTIC QUALITY: DENIED 2) FAILING TO RELEASE X-RAYS IN A TIMELY MANNER: GRANTED 3) FAILING TO WASH HAND/CHANGE GLOVES: DENIED 4) FAILING TO INSURE BRIDGE MADE PROPER TISSUE CONTACT: GRANTED 5) FAILING TO PROVIDE MARY T. WITH AN ACCURATE BILLING STATEMENT: DENIED THE COURT ORDER MATTER REMANDED TO THE BOARD REGARDING PROBATION AND PENALTY. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES WAS DENIED. DEFENSE COUNSEL KIM M. SETTLES TO PREPARE STATEMENT OF DECISION. STATEMENT OF DECISION TO BE SERVED ON OR BEFORE JAN. 22, 2003. RESPONSE BY OPPOSING COUNSEL TO BE SERVED ON OR BEFORE JAN. 29, 2003. COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER AND TRY TO AGREE ON THE STATEMENT OF DECISION ON OR BEFORE FEB. 19, 2003. SHOULD A HEARING BE NECESSARY, THE HEARING IS SET FOR FEB. 28, 2003 AT 3:00 P.M. IN DEPT. 503 REGARDING THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. COUNSEL WAIVED NOTICE. IF THERE IS A HEARING, COUNSEL TO FILE OBJECTIONS TO THE STATEMENT OF DECISION ON OR BEFORE FEB. 26, 2003. COURTESY COPY TO BE PROVIDED TO DEPT. 503. COUNSEL TO ADVISE WHETHER HEARING WILL STAY ON CALENDAR. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR # 1193, CLERK: V. MU (503)

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SAHDEV BIRKRAM, MOTION Amended PetItion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus

TO BE HEARD IN DEPT. 503 (JUDGE ROBERTSON) AT 3:30PM (302/REQ/AA)BELDON YEE # 2647

MOTION Amended Petetion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus;
Off Calendar Jan-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SAHDEV BIRKRAM Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus;

Appearances:
James E. Wager-Smith, Esq. of THE GOLDMAN LAW FIRM, (415) 435-5500, on behalf of petitioner BIRKAM SAHDEV, D.D.S. and moving party
Kim M. Settles, Esq., California Dept. of Justice, (510) 622-2138, on behalf of respondent BOARD OF DENTAL EXAMINERS, STATE OF CALIFORNIA

* At 3:00 p.m., Mr. Wager-Smith requested statement of decision. Argued and the Court ruled as follows:
1) Failing to review/take x-rays of diagnotic quality: Denied
2) Failing to release x-rays in a timely manner: Granted
3) Failing to wash hand/change gloves: Denied
4) Failing to insure bridge made proper tissue contact: Granted
5) Failing to provide Mary T. with an accurate billing statement: Denied
The Court order matter remanded to the Board regarding probation and penalty.

Request for attorney's fees was denied.

Defense counsel Kim M. Settles to prepare statement of decision. Statement of decision to be served on or before Jan. 22, 2003. Response by opposing counsel to be served on or before Jan. 29, 2003. Counsel to meet and confer and try to agree on the statement of decision on or before Feb. 19, 2003. Should a hearing be necessary, the hearing is set for Feb. 28, 2003 at 3:00 p.m. in Dept. 503 regarding the statement of decision. Counsel waived notice. If there is a hearing, counsel to file objections to the statement of decision on or before Feb. 26, 2003. Courtesy copy to be provided to Dept. 503. Counsel to advise whether hearing will stay on calendar. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR # 1193, CLERK: V. MU (AA)(503)

MOTION Amended Petetion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus;
Off Calendar Dec-06-2002 Continued To Jan-15-03 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER BIRKRAM SAHDEV, D.D.S. Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus:
APPEAR: James Wager-Smith, Esq. 435-5500 for petitioner & moving party; Kim M. Settles, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2138 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: 1) Failing to review/take x-rays of diagnostic quality deny. 2)Failing to release x-rays in timely manner grant. 3)Failing to wash hands/change gloves deny. 4)Failing to insure bridge made proper tissue contact deny. 5)Failing to provide accurate billing statement grant. Board does not have jurisdiction.
The Court continues the matter to 01/15/03 at 3:30pm. (302/AJR/AA) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
